text_block_list.text:
I rush Seiun Sky to the infirmary after she gets
hurt during training.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ngh! I've really done it this time...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I messed up this bad! Me of all
people!
choice_data_list: I'll write up a recovery plan right away!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nya-ha-ha! I'll be fine. Don't go fretting now.
choice_data_list: Just tell me you'll actually rest.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well... Maybe I will, maybe I won't.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I think I might take it easy for the time being, at
least.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it just won't feel right messing with you
when you're so concerned and whatnot.

Seiun Sky, perhaps due to the severity of her
injury, actually commits to her recuperation this
time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Thanks. I'll do my best to rest and recover...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: As if! Time to make my escape!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna be stuck in bed, but I might be out
of options this time.

Seiun Sky, perhaps due to the severity of her
injury, commits to her recovery.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hold on now... It doesn't hurt too bad. I can work
with this!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, positive. I think I can manage some light
running. And it's not so serious I need to stay off
my feet.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Told you I'd be back to normal if I just slacked off
like always. Catch ya later!

Staying true to her word, Seiun Sky ends up fully
recovering from her injury at her own leisurely
pace.
